zh.lifeSummary: 當Hawise Multon於大約1165年出生在英國林可爾史爾易爾比 奧 波時，她的父親Lambert de Multon I45歲，母親Hawise de Briwere36歲。她於大約1189年與Henry de Beke Lord of Eresby在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1220年在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hawise Multon于大约1165年出生在英国林可爾史爾易爾比 奧 波时，她的父亲Lambert de Multon I45岁，母亲Hawise de Briwere36岁。她于大约1189年与Henry de Beke Lord of Eresby在英国英格兰林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1220年在英国英格兰林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Multon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Moulton
meanings: English (mainly Cheshire and Lancashire): habitational name from one or more of the places called Moulton (Cheshire, Lincolnshire, Norfolk, Northamptonshire, Staffordshire, Suffolk, North Yorkshire), most of which are named with the Old English personal name Mūl(a), the Old Norse personal name Múli, or Old English mūl ‘mule’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Hawise
meanings: This female name (which has been corrupted down to Avice and Avis) is from Hadewisa, formed from the German name Hedvig, same as Edwig, which Wachter translates 'propugnator felicitatis;' say, 'fortunate soldier.'

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Hawise Multon was born about 1165, in Irby on Humber, Lincolnshire, England, her father, Lambert de Multon I, was 45 and her mother, Hawise de Briwere, was 36. She married Henry de Beke Lord of Eresby about 1189, in Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1220, in Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hawise Multon est née environ 1165, à Irby on Humber, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Lambert de Multon I, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Hawise de Briwere, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Henry de Beke Lord of Eresby environ 1189, à Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1220, à Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hawise Multon um 1165 in Irby on Humber, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lambert de Multon I 45 und ihre Mutter Hawise de Briwere 36. Sie hat um 1189 in Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Henry de Beke Lord of Eresby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1220 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise Multon è nata il circa 1165 nel Irby on Humber, Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, Lambert de Multon I, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Hawise de Briwere, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Henry de Beke Lord of Eresby circa 1189, nel Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1220, nel Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.Eresby, Lincolnshire, England: イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスパルスビーエレスビー
ja.lifeSummary: Hawise Multonが約1165年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアイルビー オン ハンバーで生まれた時，父Lambert de Multon Iは45歳，母Hawise de Briwereは36歳であった。約1189年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスパルスビーエレスビーでHenry de Beke Lord of Eresbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1220年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスパルスビーエレスビーで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hawise Multon(이)가 대략 1165년 영국 링코실르 이르비  훔버에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lambert de Multon I(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hawise de Briwere(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 대략 1189년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스피스비 레스비에서 Henry de Beke Lord of Eresby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1220년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스피스비 레스비에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise Multon nasceu aproximadamente 1165, em Irby on Humber, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lambert de Multon I, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Hawise de Briwere, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry de Beke Lord of Eresby aproximadamente 1189, em Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1220, em Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hawise Multon родилась около 1165 г. в местности ирби он хумбир, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Lambert de Multon I было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Hawise de Briwere, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry de Beke Lord of Eresby около 1189 г. в местности эресби, спилсби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1220 г. в местности эресби, спилсби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hawise Multon nació aproximadamente 1165, en Irby on Humber, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Lambert de Multon I, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Hawise de Briwere, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Henry de Beke Lord of Eresby aproximadamente 1189, en Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1220, en Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 56 años.
